title: dryopteris barbigera var. falconeri
intro: Dryopteris barbigera var. falconeri, also known as the Falconer's shield fern, is a specific variety of the Dryopteris barbigera plant, a type of fern native to the Himalayas. The plant is said to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are believed to be beneficial for various health issues. The health benefits associated with this plant include potential relief from arthritis, gout, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its ability to support respiratory health. Dryopteris barbigera var. falconeri is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it may also be used in tincture form, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
